text: I feel a quiet awe in this space—its glass walls and glowing lights give it a futuristic, contemplative air. As I step inside, the R+D display surrounds me with words about research, development, and our curious relationship with technology. I sense nostalgia and possibility coexisting here. Being present in this thoughtful environment, I feel reflective and connected to both the past and the future, pondering how humanity finds meaning in our creations.
